rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Meta-frame lectures are closers, not openers.
Walk-away test (M2+). Does the student leave the chair while the agent works?
Student agency — adults decide. Opportunity ≠ compulsion.
Delegation boundaries — student brings, Claude screens.
Teach the principle and the technique — default.
Auto-fire sim + eval after significant rewrite.
rules_evaluated.evidence: maintainer block line: 'Re-audit writing / story / technical classes after this addition' — the hooks section was added 2026-05-15 (a named structural addition introducing a new conceptual section), but the Quality block carries only 'compendium-audited 2026-04-26' with no pedagogy SHA pin post-touch. Rule 15 requires sim + eval after rewrites that integrate new practitioner content.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Queue sim + eval for this file now that the hooks section has landed; stamp pedagogy@<sha> in the Quality dimension-log after the eval passes.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing functions stay, scripted reactions go — forcing functions live in prompts, not body prose.
Reflection beats prefer in-chat over file-write.
Classroom is the default delivery mode; body teaches the work, trainer manages the room.
Verification machinery needs a smoke-test before being trusted.
Plug points + UX — the file must be both plug-able and operable.
Per-exercise leap test — name three observable Monday-morning outcomes.
Per-phase failure mode + escape hatch — every forcing function names its dominant failure.
Heavy fan-out prompts get a body-side recovery callout.
Pre-action framing blocks don't preview the prompt's payoff.
Engineer-audience audit fixes default to body callout, not forcing function.
